name: RebarLengthAdjustmentDataNullable
summary: The RebarLengthAdjustmentDataNullable class defines the length adjustment at the end of a reinforcing bar affected by a RebarEndDetailModifier. If a length adjustment property is null then that property will not be applied to the RebarSet generated reinforcing bars.

constructors.name: RebarLengthAdjustmentDataNullable
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the RebarLengthAdjustmentDataNullable class.

properties.name: AdjustmentLength
properties.summary: Gets or sets the adjustment length.

properties.name: AdjustmentType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the adjustment type.
